name: workbench
description: Opens each project into a fixed workbench layout: Explorer, an editor over a terminal, and a Claude terminal beside them. Part of the dotfiles repo.

dotfilesWorkbench.autoLayout.description: Build the dev layout automatically when a folder opens (and no layout was restored).

dotfilesWorkbench.claudeAutostart.description: Run `claude` in the right-hand terminal when the layout is built. Off by default: the column opens a ready shell where you type `claude` yourself.

dotfilesWorkbench.shellPath.description: Path to the terminal launcher. Empty uses ~/.local/bin/dev-shell.
